jobs.title: Hardened Azure Virtual Desktop Setup -- 2
jobs.description:
I need a fully secured Azure Virtual Desktop environment stood up within the next two–three weeks. The workspace will be used for general office tasks and must ship with the complete Microsoft 365 stack I rely on every day—Word, Excel, Teams, Outlook, OneDrive, and SharePoint—already installed, licensed, and optimised.

jobs.title: Infrastructure CAD Drafting Needed
jobs.description:
I have a set of infrastructure layouts that now need to be translated into clean, accurate CAD drawings. The focus is on roads and highways, along with associated water-related utilities (think mains, drainage lines, culverts). All source sketches, survey data, and design notes are ready; what I need is someone who can turn them into professional, well-layered DWG files that follow standard civil drafting conventions.

You should be comfortable working in AutoCAD or Civil 3D—MicroStation experience is a bonus—as I’d like the final files delivered in native format plus PDFs for quick review. Pl

jobs.title: Modern Combination Logo Design
jobs.description:
My brand needs a fresh, modern logo that pairs clean, contemporary typography with a distinctive icon. I’m open on colour, so feel free to propose palettes that reinforce a sleek, forward-thinking feel.  

The goal is a versatile mark that works on everything from digital headers to small merchandise, so vector formats (AI/SVG) alongside high-resolution PNG/JPEG files are required. Please include the font details and any colour codes you choose in the final hand-off.  

I’d like to see a few initial concepts, refine the strongest direction together, then receive polished final files ready for

jobs.title: Hire the Fiduciary Shield (The Legal)
jobs.description:
2. Hire the Fiduciary Shield (The Legal)
You do not write contracts from scratch. That is how you inherit liability.

The Easy Play: You go to LegalZoom, or you hire a freelance paralegal on Upwork. You give them the "Atheist Business" parameter:

"I am selling a physical hardware setup (a mini-server) to clients so they can store their own data locally. I need a Master Service Agreement (MSA) and a Liability Waiver that explicitly states I am only providing the physical architecture. The client retains 100% ownership and liability for whatever data they put on it. If their hard drive crashes
skills: ContractsLegalLegal AnalysisLegal ResearchLegal ReviewLegal TranslationLegal WritingParalegal Services

jobs.title: Migrate Website Domain Seamlessly
jobs.description:
I need my current website moved from its existing domain to a brand-new one without losing data, functionality, or search-engine equity. The full site—files, databases, media, and internal links—must load and behave exactly the same under the new URL.

Please include in your approach:
• A clean export/import of all site assets and databases.  
• Updates to any hard-coded paths or links so nothing points back to the old domain.  
• Proven steps for preserving SEO, such as 301 redirects and updated sitemaps (advise on the exact setup; we can finalise together).
